summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RECRA Solutions CPQ iteration 9. All new products verified: Nice M5BAR slagboom (3 variants), 5 UniFi Protect cameras (G5 Bullet, G5 Dome Ultra, G5 Pro, G5 Turret Ultra, AI LPR), 4 UniFi Access products (Hub, Lite, Pro, Starter Kit). Old products correctly removed (Muntautomaat, IP Camera Basis, PTZ Camera Pro, ANPR Camera, RFID Lezer, Mobile Key Systeem). Total product count: 25. All backend API tests passed (19/19). Frontend: Products visible in Step 3 sidebar, category filter works correctly, click-to-place functionality working with new products.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/products returns 25 products total
Backend: Nice M5BAR exists in slagboom category with price €3,079
Backend: Nice M5BAR + Kentekenherkenning exists with price €3,628
Backend: UniFi G5 Bullet exists in camera category with price €139
Backend: UniFi G5 Dome Ultra exists in camera category with price €139
Backend: UniFi G5 Pro exists in camera category with price €399
Backend: UniFi G5 Turret Ultra exists in camera category with price €159
Backend: UniFi AI LPR Camera exists in camera category with price €549
Backend: Camera category has exactly 5 products
Backend: UniFi Access Hub exists in toegangscontrole with price €219
Backend: UniFi Access Reader Lite (UA-Lite) exists with price €109
Backend: UniFi Access Reader Pro (UA-Pro) exists with price €329
Backend: UniFi Access Starter Kit exists with price €599
Backend: Toegangscontrole category has exactly 4 products
Backend: No Muntautomaat products exist
Backend: No old cameras (IP Camera Basis, PTZ Camera Pro, ANPR Camera) exist
Backend: No old access control (RFID Lezer, Mobile Key Systeem) exist
Backend: Category filter by camera returns only UniFi cameras
Backend: Category filter by slagboom returns Nice M5BAR products
Frontend: Products visible in Step 3 sidebar
Frontend: Category dropdown shows all categories (Sanitair, Slagbomen, WiFi, Verlichting, Betaalsystemen, Douchelezers, Camera's, Toegangscontrole)
Frontend: Camera filter shows all 5 UniFi cameras with correct prices
Frontend: Slagbomen filter shows Nice M5BAR, Nice M5BAR + Kentekenherkenning, Premium Toegangspoort
Frontend: Toegangscontrole filter shows all 4 UniFi Access products
Frontend: Click-to-place works - UniFi G5 Bullet placed successfully
Frontend: Click-to-place works - UniFi G5 Pro placed successfully
Frontend: Product count updates correctly (1 producten, 2 producten)
Frontend: Pricing calculates correctly (€139 for G5 Bullet, €538 for G5 Bullet + G5 Pro)
Frontend: Installation costs calculated correctly (€100 for G5 Bullet, €300 for both)
Frontend: Lease/month calculated correctly (€5 for G5 Bullet, €17 for both)
Frontend: Toast notifications show product placement confirmation
seed_data_creation: None - using existing seed data with new products
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 verified all new products: Nice M5BAR slagboom (€3,079), Nice M5BAR + Kentekenherkenning (€3,628), Premium Toegangspoort (€12,000), 5 UniFi cameras (G5 Bullet €139, G5 Dome Ultra €139, G5 Pro €399, G5 Turret Ultra €159, AI LPR €549), 4 UniFi Access products (Hub €219, UA-Lite €109, UA-Pro €329, Starter Kit €599). Old products removed on startup. Total 25 products across 8 categories. Category filter dropdown works. Click-to-place works with coverage radius visualization. Pricing sidebar updates correctly with investment, lease/month, and installation costs.
